title: Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur – Skilled Tradesmen – 169 Posts
shortInfo: Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur Recruitment 2026 offers 169 vacancies for Skilled Tradesmen posts. Eligible candidates with Diploma, Any Graduate, ITI can apply online from 16-05-2026 to 30-05-2026 through the official Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur website, ddpdoo.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur Skilled Tradesmen Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 169 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur Recruitment 2026 offers 169 vacancies for Skilled Tradesmen posts. Eligible candidates with Diploma, Any Graduate, ITI can apply online from 16-05-2026 to 30-05-2026 through the official Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur website, ddpdoo.gov.in.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 15 days from date of publication in Employment News

qualification.education_qualification: Candidates with NTC, NAC, Diploma & Degree must mention qualifications in that order; only the minimum essential qualification will be considered for marks weightage

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 31,840/- per month (Basic Pay Rs. 19,900/- + DA @ 60%)

selection_process: Trade Test/Practical Test + Written Test/Interview (50-50 weightage)
Combined weightage: 50% Trade Test/Interview + 50% Essential Technical Qualification marks
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through https://vacancy.parasnet.com. No offline applications will be accepted.
seo_tags: Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur Skilled Tradesmen Recruitment 2026
